title: Russia cloaks launch schedule after spaceport falls in Ukraine's sights

title: Elon Musk's 7 biggest stumbles on the stand at OpenAI trial

description: In this episode of Uncanny Valley, we get into how the Elon Musk-Sam Altman trial goes way beyond their rivalry and could have major implications both for OpenAI and also the AI industry at large.

title: Exclusive eBook: Inside the stealthy startup that pitched brainless human clones
description: The ultimate plan to live forever is a brand new body. This subscriber-only eBook explores R3 Bio, a small startup that has pitched a startling and ethically charged vision for “brainless clones” to serve the role of backup human bodies. by Antonio Regalado March 20, 2026 Related Stories

title: OpenAI announces new advanced security for ChatGPT accounts, including a partnership with Yubico

title: OpenAI Rolls Out ‘Advanced’ Security Mode for At-Risk Accounts
description: OpenAI is rolling out Advanced Account Security for people concerned that their ChatGPT or Codex accounts could be potential targets of phishing attacks.

title: This startup’s new mechanistic interpretability tool lets you debug LLMs
description: The San Francisco–based startup Goodfire just released a new tool, called Silico, that lets researchers and engineers peer inside an AI model and adjust its parameters—the settings that determine a model’s behavior—during training. title: These Men Allegedly Profit Off Teaching People How to Make AI Porn
description: Three Arizona women have filed a lawsuit against a group of men that alleges they used the women’s photos to make AI porn influencers, then offered online courses showing others how to do it.

title: Reid Hoffman Thinks Doctors Should Ask AI for a Second Opinion
